reach_why: Extends familiar critiques of language-only AI and hindsight bias, but does not open fundamentally new explanatory territory.
novelty_why: Non-obviously links Einstein, ontology change, damaged evidence, and ritualized social persistence into one cautionary epistemic frame.
falsifiable_why: Test by comparing reconstruction success versus genuine novel discovery under ontology shifts and mathematically indispensable domains.
explanation: Language-first systems may excel at reconstructing past genius while failing at novel discovery, especially with corrupted evaluation evidence.
